title: Behula
desc: A woman decides to dare death to bring her husband and his six siblings back to life and rescue their ships for the sake of love.

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
desc: When snake venom strikes her husband, Ponchomi discovers her hidden mystical powers. She sets off on a perilous spiritual quest, battling dark odds to bring him back to life.

title: Ponchomi
desc: Srimoyee adopts young Tara to keep her safe, unaware of a looming shadow. She must protect the girl from Agharnath, a dark necromancer obsessed with sacrificing Tara for immortality.

title: Behula
desc: Driven by pure devotion, a courageous woman decides to challenge death itself. She risks everything to resurrect her husband and his six siblings, while also rescuing their lost ships.

title: Mahabharat
desc: As the Pandavas move into the forest, they see Ashwatthama and his army. Consequently, to evade their attack, Yudhishthira leads Kunti and his brothers deep into the jungle.

title: Nishir Daak
desc: On Ratnakari's advice, Nishi traps Shreemoyee inside a ring of fire so that she can't escape. She then transforms into Shreemoyee and tries to kill Rudro. Will Nishi be successful in making Rudro believe that Shreemoyee is really an evil witch?

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Mainadevi approaches Narayan and requests him to marry Parvati, and he accepts her proposal. Narayan impersonates Lord Shiva to meet Parvati.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Parvati realises Narayan's deceit. She confronts him to declare his true identity and refuses to marry. Mainadevi becomes anxious when Parvati transforms into Goddess Adishakti.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: After learning about Parvati's true identity, Mainadevi realises her mistake. Ganga implores Mainadevi to grant permission for the wedding of Lord Shiva and Parvati.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
desc: Ashwini decides to meet Bama, discovering that he is Sarbananda's son. Parallelly, Raaji decides to help Bama meet Ashwini after learning that he is Sarbananda's spiritual master.

title: Ponchomi
desc: Thammi is excited about Ponchomi's arrival and plans out her homecoming rituals. Kinjal goes against Thammi and does not accept her.

title: Mahabharat
desc: Bhishma teaches the kids to eat without using their elbows. Meanwhile, the Kauravas create difficulties for the Pandavas while they live in the palace.

title: Nishir Daak
desc: Convinced that Shreemoyee is a witch, Rudro denies taking her home. Shreemoyee tries to convince him that it wasn't she who tried to kill him, but someone else in her disguise. Rudro returns home and informs Tara that Shreemoyee will never come home.

title: Behula
